narrative:
Brookville-D (precinct in Montgomery County) has 995 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.6 percentage points.
